def: The act of working together toward a shared goal.

Very great in degree; far from ordinary.
As an added thing; on top of that.
Whatever else is true; anyway.
Happening once a year or every year.
A highly skilled expert; also a champion.

To the greatest degree that can be managed.

To gain points, or to make a good impression.
Not mixed with anything else; clean and clear.

With the result that.
The pointed end or top of something; also the lead position.

Not controlled or affected by others.
Without exception; also used to mean 'definitely'.
A careful study or inspection to find something out.
Most likely; probably.

A move from one thing to another; also small change.
Used with 'noch' to mean 'neither ... nor'.
For what reason.

A follower or fan; also a vehicle towed behind another.
A public statement that tells people about something.
The act of watching or listening carefully; also thoughtfulness.
The length of time something lasts.
Final and certain; without doubt.
Used with 'je' to link two comparisons ('the more ... the more').

Extremely large or great.

Able to be bought or obtained.

Small in amount, size, or importance.
Good at doing things with skill and ease.
A planned series of actions to reach a goal.

A choice that can be made.
Happening or done with speed.

Without doubt; surely.
Able to be seen.
A place to sit; also the main location of an organisation.
The period of a sports or theatre season.
No later than a stated time.
To notice something through feeling.

A connection between things or people; also a proportion.

Present and able to be used.
Done again and again.
Needing or controlled by something else.

Used to introduce the second of two contrasting sides.
A change made to fit new conditions.
In other respects; or else.
The sound of people clapping to show approval.
A sudden strong action against someone or something.
Onto or toward each other.
A state of lively feeling or nervous stir.
Away from each other; into separate parts.

To come across someone or something.
An occasion of meeting someone.
Kept within limits; not large in amount.
A condition that limits a person's movement or senses.

To decide or set something firmly.
To connect one thing to another; also to obtain or move in.

A republic made up of united states, like Germany.
Continuing for a long time or forever.
In the near future.

To move steadily along like a liquid.

Relating to the whole; usual or overall.

Very strong, forceful, or intense.
In connection with this; at this point.

Lasting for many years.

At any time.
